# MuleSoft Google Sheets Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Google Sheets Connector documentation.
> See [Google Sheets Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Google Sheets Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Google Sheets Connector 1.1 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/latest/google-sheets-connector-examples.md)
- [Google Sheets Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/latest/google-sheets-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Google Sheets Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/latest/google-sheets-connector-studio.md)
- [Google Sheets - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/latest/google-sheets-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Google Sheets Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/google-sheets-connector/latest/index.md)
